name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.53: uploaded product images now appear in the admin catalog immediately. The catalog card built its image from the planogram copy first and only fell back to our catalog, so an operator upload stayed invisible until the stale Weimi-sourced planogram image happened to refresh. A normalized image we host is now authoritative in the dashboard, mirroring how config.images already overrides local images on the kiosk. Cumulative over v5.52.
